summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Solaris Films website iteration 5. NEW FEATURE: 21 individual product pages (Schede Prodotto) at /prodotti and /prodotti/:slug. All 21 products load correctly with proper technical data, characteristics, badges, and navigation. Product catalog index shows all products organized by category (Antisolari, Sicurezza, Privacy). Backend API health check returns 200. All existing pages still work.
critical_code_review_comments: All 21 product pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Product detail pages correctly show: name, categoria badge, certificazione badge, garanzia badge, description, characteristics list
Technical data section with animated energy bars renders correctly for products with specs
Products without technical data (GullWing, Vetrofanie) correctly skip the technical data section
Navigation works: Header 'Prodotti' link, breadcrumb 'Tutti i prodotti', CTA buttons, Focus Tecnico links
Product cards on index page navigate to correct individual product detail pages

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 21 product pages + index page + existing pages working)

seed_data_creation: None - product data is in frontend siteContent.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 adds 21 individual product pages. All products tested: madico-sb-20-e-ps-sr, madico-sb-35-e-ps-sr, tecnosolar-nt-20-e-ps-sr, madico-sg-20-e-ps-sr, madico-sl-8-e-ps-sr, tecnosolar-ssn-50-te-sr, madico-rs-20-e-ps-sr, madico-rs-40-e-ps-sr, madico-rs-20-ps-sr-4mil, madico-rs-20-ps-sr-8mil, madico-rs-40-ps-sr-4mil, madico-rs-40-ps-sr-8mil, madico-cl-400-ps-sr, madico-cl-400-e-ps-sr, madico-cl-700-ps-sr, madico-cl-700-e-ps-sr, madico-safetyshield-800, madico-safetyshield-1500, madico-gullwing, madico-mt-200-xw, vetrofanie. Product data is in siteContent.js (frontend-only). Previous iterations 1-4 all passed 100%.

prodotti_index.details: Index page at /prodotti shows all 21 products organized by category (Antisolari, Sicurezza, Privacy)

prodotti_categories.details: All 3 category sections found: Antisolari, Sicurezza, Privacy

product_detail_with_specs.details: Product madico-sb-20-e-ps-sr shows: title, categoria badge, certificazione badge, garanzia badge, 6 characteristics, technical data section with energy bars and spec cards (VLT, IR, UV, Energia Respinta)

product_detail_accessory.details: Products without technical data (madico-gullwing, vetrofanie) correctly show characteristics but skip technical data section

breadcrumb_navigation.details: Breadcrumb 'Tutti i prodotti' link on product detail page navigates back to /prodotti

focus_tecnico_link.details: Focus tecnico link on product pages navigates correctly to /focus-tecnico/:slug

product_card_navigation.details: Product card links from index page navigate to correct individual product detail page
